'''鈭歽-ch-zh''' ('''yachazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ulcerate|ulcerate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ch-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ulcerate|ulcerate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-ch-zh
|-
! Lemma
| yachazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yachazhithi|yachazhithi]] || [[word:yachazhiji|yachazhiji]] || [[word:yachazhishi|yachazhishi]] || [[word:yachazhi|yachazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yachazhuthuth|yachazhuthuth]] || [[word:yachazhujuj|yachazhujuj]] || [[word:yachazhushush|yachazhushush]] || [[word:yachazh|yachazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yachazhuthu|yachazhuthu]] || [[word:yachazhuju|yachazhuju]] || [[word:yachazhushu|yachazhushu]] || [[word:yachazhu|yachazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yachazhufuth|yachazhufuth]] || [[word:yachazhufuj|yachazhufuj]] || [[word:yachazhufush|yachazhufush]] || [[word:yachazhuf|yachazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yachazhethe|yachazhethe]] || [[word:yachazheje|yachazheje]] || [[word:yachazheshe|yachazheshe]] || [[word:yachazhe|yachazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yachazhothoth|yachazhothoth]] || [[word:yachazhojoj|yachazhojoj]] || [[word:yachazhoshosh|yachazhoshosh]] || [[word:yachazh|yachazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yachazhotho|yachazhotho]] || [[word:yachazhojo|yachazhojo]] || [[word:yachazhosho|yachazhosho]] || [[word:yachazho|yachazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yachazhofoth|yachazhofoth]] || [[word:yachazhofoj|yachazhofoj]] || [[word:yachazhofosh|yachazhofosh]] || [[word:yachazhof|yachazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yachazh忙th忙|yachazh忙th忙]] || [[word:yachazh忙j忙|yachazh忙j忙]] || [[word:yachazh忙sh忙|yachazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:yachazh忙|yachazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yachazhathath|yachazhathath]] || [[word:yachazhajaj|yachazhajaj]] || [[word:yachazhashash|yachazhashash]] || [[word:yachazh|yachazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yachazhatha|yachazhatha]] || [[word:yachazhaja|yachazhaja]] || [[word:yachazhasha|yachazhasha]] || [[word:yachazha|yachazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yachazhafath|yachazhafath]] || [[word:yachazhafaj|yachazhafaj]] || [[word:yachazhafash|yachazhafash]] || [[word:yachazhaf|yachazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yachazhasha|yachazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyachazhasha|goyachazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyachazhasha|gokiyachazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yachazhn眉sha|yachazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyachazhnkn眉sha|goyachazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyachazhn眉sha|gokiyachazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yachazhsh毛sha|yachazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyachazhnksh毛sha|goyachazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyachazhsh毛sha|gokiyachazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yachazhrosha|yachazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyachazhnkrosha|goyachazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyachazhrosha|gokiyachazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yachazhmusha|yachazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyachazhnkmusha|goyachazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyachazhmusha|gokiyachazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yachazhsherasha|yachazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyachazhnksherasha|goyachazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyachazhsherasha|gokiyachazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yachazhngasha|yachazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyachazhnkngasha|goyachazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyachazhngasha|gokiyachazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yachazhyasha|yachazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyachazhnkyasha|goyachazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyachazhyasha|gokiyachazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yachazhyamasha|yachazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyachazhnkyamasha|goyachazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyachazhyamasha|gokiyachazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yachazhn眉sh毛sha|yachazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyachazhnkn眉sh毛sha|goyachazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyachazhn眉sh毛sha|gokiyachazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yachazhn眉rosha|yachazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyachazhnkn眉rosha|goyachazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyachazhn眉rosha|gokiyachazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yachazhn眉musha|yachazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyachazhnkn眉musha|goyachazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyachazhn眉musha|gokiyachazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yachazhsh毛n眉sha|yachazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyachazhnksh毛n眉sha|goyachazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyachazhsh毛n眉sha|gokiyachazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yachazhsh毛rosha|yachazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyachazhnksh毛rosha|goyachazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyachazhsh毛rosha|gokiyachazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yachazhsh毛musha|yachazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyachazhnksh毛musha|goyachazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyachazhsh毛musha|gokiyachazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yachazhron眉sha|yachazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyachazhnkron眉sha|goyachazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyachazhron眉sha|gokiyachazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yachazhrosh毛sha|yachazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyachazhnkrosh毛sha|goyachazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyachazhrosh毛sha|gokiyachazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yachazhromusha|yachazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyachazhnkromusha|goyachazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyachazhromusha|gokiyachazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yachazhmun眉sha|yachazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyachazhnkmun眉sha|goyachazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyachazhmun眉sha|gokiyachazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yachazhmush毛sha|yachazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyachazhnkmush毛sha|goyachazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyachazhmush毛sha|gokiyachazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yachazhmurosha|yachazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyachazhnkmurosha|goyachazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyachazhmurosha|gokiyachazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yachazh|yachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:y忙ch忙zh|y忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyachazh|hoyachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoy忙ch忙zh|hoy忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyachazh|hohoyachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoy忙ch忙zh|hohoy忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉yachazh|n眉yachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉y忙ch忙zh|n眉y忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉yachazh|n眉n眉yachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉y忙ch忙zh|n眉n眉y忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂yachazh|n茂yachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂y忙ch忙zh|n茂y忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂yachazh|n茂n茂yachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂y忙ch忙zh|n茂n茂y忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyachazh|luyachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luy忙ch忙zh|luy忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyachazh|luluyachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluy忙ch忙zh|luluy忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyachazh|liyachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liy忙ch忙zh|liy忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyachazh|liliyachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliy忙ch忙zh|liliy忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyachazh|koyachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koy忙ch忙zh|koy忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyachazh|kokoyachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoy忙ch忙zh|kokoy忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyachazh|keyachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:key忙ch忙zh|key忙ch忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyachazh|kekeyachazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekey忙ch忙zh|kekey忙ch忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
